n: Instance: Last Wishes of the Lord of Langstrand

steps.t: Caebar is in the study of Lond Cirion, where Golasgil's testament will be read.
Lady Marra has produced her husband's final wishes and set them on the table.
The study of Lond Cirion may contain samples of Lord Golasgil's writing that can be used to prove he wrote the testament, and its provenance made secu…
Caebar is in the study of Lond Cirion, seeking to prove that Golasgil's testament was truly written by the Lord of Anfalas before his death in battle.
King Elessar is in the study of Lond Cirion.
